## type [Provider](<https://github.com/yandu-app/skills-fs/blob/main/provider/local/local.go#L13>)

Provider executes local shell commands with context cancellation.

<a name="Provider.Invoke"></a>
### func \(\*Provider\) [Invoke](<https://github.com/yandu-app/skills-fs/blob/main/provider/local/local.go#L29>)

```go
func (p *Provider) Invoke(ctx context.Context, action string, params map[string]interface{}) (*core.ProviderResult, error)
```

Invoke runs a local command. The action is the command to execute. Supported params:

- "args": \[\]string — command arguments
- "env": \[\]string — extra environment variables \(KEY=VALUE\)
- "dir": string — working directory
- "stdin": string — data written to the command's standard input
